title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report — AIAgent_05_2026
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 13 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 90.4%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 92.3%, and average score is 7.88/10. Total training hours are 188 and scaled cost is 9.6. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training course 'AI Agent & LLM Application Development' has been completed with a total of 13 trainees. The overall attendance rate stands at 90.4%, and the course has achieved a 100% completion rate. The pass rate is 92.3%, with an average score of 7.88 out of 10. Despite these positive metrics, the overall effectiveness classification is marked as Risk, indicating potential areas for improvement.
insights: AI Agent & LLM Application Development has the strongest effectiveness score (89.47) in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainee(s) meet the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
1 course group(s) contain learners who need support based on score or attendance policy.
1 high-priority L&D NORM flag(s) were triggered.
The course has demonstrated strong performance metrics, including a high attendance rate and completion rate.
However, the effectiveness classification of Risk suggests that there are underlying issues that need to be addressed, particularly concerning individual trainee performance.
Notably, there is at least one learner who requires additional support, as indicated by the governance flags.
recommendations: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources
Create a coaching plan for support-needed learners and review attendance issues with direct managers.
To enhance the effectiveness of the training program, it is recommended to provide 1:1 coaching for the identified at-risk trainee and to assign a buddy or additional practice resources.
Additionally, a review of the course content may be beneficial to ensure it meets the needs of all trainees, particularly those struggling to meet the pass threshold.

checklist.detail: Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sheets were mapped to simulated sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count × total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one assessment/pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID, trainee ID, period
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the catalog.

normFlags.action: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources

supportNeededTrainees.reason: Below pass threshold or attendance below 70%

supportNeededGroups.reason: At least one learner is below pass threshold or attendance policy.
